---
title: "Annie or Anne Baker"
---

## Annie or Anne Baker

**Dates:** (b. 1840/1)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

Described as a new Gosling as ‘Sparrowhawk’ in September 1867, she was living at Upper East Hayes, Bath, and was daughter of Major Thomas Richard Baker (1802-1884) J.P., 7th Fusiliers Rtd. and Mary Frances Anderson Morshead (d. 1843).  She was first cousin to fellow Goslings [[person:28]Mary] and Beatrice Anderson Morshead, and was related to CMY through her great-grandmother. [LG 1906 Baker of Bayfordbury, 1871 census]

### Letters

- Letter from [March 1869]
- Letter from March 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]
- Letter from Oct 30th [1868]
- Letter from July 1st [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
